dc_open_data.notes: DC HSA updates their social services dataset on a monthly cadence per their data dictionary. API is stable and versioned. Recommend scraping on the 1st of each month.

md_open_data.notes: Maryland DHHS food resource data is refreshed monthly. Socrata-based API with reliable uptime. Recommend scraping on the 2nd of each month to allow for upstream processing lag.

pg_county_cfec.notes: HTML page with no API. Member directory changes when organizations join or update hours. Nonprofit sites often update without notice. Weekly scrape recommended; monitor for structural HTML changes that would break the parser.

va_open_data.notes: VDSS community resources dataset updated monthly. Socrata-based API. Virginia 211 data may update more frequently but requires separate API key. Recommend monthly scrape on the 3rd of each month.

umd_extension.notes: Static HTML pages with no structured data or API. Update frequency is unpredictable — pages may go months without changes or update suddenly during food drives or seasonal programs. Weekly scrape is a reasonable default but low confidence. Consider reducing to bi-weekly if scrape consistently returns no new records.

dc_open_data_cafb.notes: No change interval observed yet — need at least 2 runs with content changes.

pgcfec.notes: Observed avg change interval: 1 days. Confidence: observed.

md_food_bank.notes: No change interval observed yet — need at least 2 runs with content changes.

211_maryland.notes: No change interval observed yet — need at least 2 runs with content changes.
